overall.description: A ship simulator game showing a first-person view from the bridge of a vessel navigating through open water during overcast, dusk-like conditions. The heads-up display includes navigation charts, rotating radar, and depth sounder while the ship proceeds steadily through choppy seas.

agents.ego_description: navigating the ship from the bridge, monitoring the radar and chart displays while maintaining course through open waters

entered.detail: LCD display showing nautical chart with colored zones and vessel position
Circular radar screen with rotating sweep arm showing surrounding contacts
Blue screen showing water depth and sonar data
Red-painted bow deck of the vessel extending forward from the bridge
Metal safety railing along the left side of the deck
Metal safety railing along the right side of the deck
Choppy dark grey sea extending to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The view from a ship's bridge shows the vessel moving steadily through open water under overcast skies. Navigation monitors display charts, rotating radar, and depth data while the bow cuts through choppy seas, with metal railings visible on either side of the foredeck.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as the vessel navigates through a vast, overcast maritime environment. It begins with the bow cutting through choppy seas, where the rhythmic motion of the water is framed by the metal railings of the foredeck. As the ship proceeds, the focus integrates the glow of navigation monitors displaying rotating radar, depth data, and digital charts. The scene remains immersed in the muted light of a gray sky, following the ship's constant forward momentum across the open water.
